title: Google Workspace Organizational Units and Microsoft Groups

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

The list and structure of the Organizational Units your agency has in your Google Workspace configuration, including sub-units. The easiest way to retrieve this is probably using GAM (https://github.com/GAM-team/GAM) by using the command "gam print orgs". Alternatively, it may be listed in the Google Admin console, but from my understanding it may be more difficult to retrieve the structure from that.

The list and structure of your Microsoft 365 Groups and Microsoft 365 Security Groups. This should be in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center and can be exported to a csv.

To make things simple, I do not need a comprehensive list on who or what accounts are in the Organizational Units or Groups. However, if it's included in the output I would still appreciate metadata such as group email addresses, owner information, permission information, etc.

If you have any questions or wish to clarify any part of this request feel free to let me know.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Olivia

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any signed and/or executed employment contract/agreement/offer letter/memorandum of understanding between Middle Tennessee State University, Nike, and BSN Sports.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kent Hoover, a citizen of Tennessee, in coordination with Ellen.

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Alabama Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Any signed and/or executed employment contract/agreement/offer letter/memorandum of understanding between Alabama State University and Monique Holland.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

André Natta, a citizen of Alabama, in coordination with Ellen.
